    All Packages

    Package Summary
    Package
    Description
    application
    Contains the main entry point for the game application.
    entity
    Contains core interfaces that define behaviors and capabilities for entities in the game.
    entity.base
    Contains base abstract classes for core game items like ingredients and containers.
    entity.containers
    Contains concrete implementations of containers used to hold ingredients.
    entity.ingredients
    Contains concrete implementations of specific ingredients used in cooking.
    gui
    Contains the main user interface components, including the main menu, settings, and the primary game scene.
    gui.components
    Contains reusable graphical user interface components used across various scenes.
    gui.room
    Contains the specific UI room layouts and logics where the player can navigate and interact with counters.
    logic
    Contains core game logic, instances, and basic game state enumerations.
    logic.counters
    Contains implementations of all interactive kitchen counters.
    logic.menus
    Contains implementations of the various menus and validation logics for customer orders.
    sprites
    Contains classes responsible for rendering and animating 2D sprites.
    util
    Contains general utility classes and wrapper objects used across the application.
    util.wrapper
    Contains wrapper classes for audio logic, primarily used by the util package.
